parse.title: Axiom Arc
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Edge of Night;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes = 
* Without any additional Lethality, {{sbc|Flux}} refunds {{ap|10+{{cid|Axiom Arc|lethality}}*0.25}}% of ultimate cooldown on its own.
* If {{sbc|Flux}} would refund the user's ultimate ability cooldown to the point that it is refreshed, the cooldown will instead be modified to {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
** This will occur even if the ultimate's remaining cooldown is less than {{fd|0.5}} seconds.{{bug|2}}
* If the user's ultimate ability does not start its cooldown as soon as it is cast, and {{sbc|Flux}} is triggered in the meantime, the cooldown refund takes effect after the ability goes on cooldown.
** If {{sbc|Flux}} is triggered multiple times in this case, the cooldown refund will stack up.

|revisions = 
|patchhistory =
;[[V26.09]]
* Flux base cooldown reduction reduced to 10% of total cooldown from 15%.
* Flux cooldown reduction lethality ratio increased to {{as|{{fd|0.25}}% per 1 Lethality}} from {{as|{{fd|0.15%}}|lethality}}.

;[[V25.17]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2750}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|363}} from {{g|613}}.

;[[V14.21]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} If multiple '''Axiom Arc''' owners on the same team take down the same target, all of them now properly gain Flux's cooldown reduction, instead of only the killer.

;[[V14.19]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|613}} from {{g|563}}.
** Total cost unchanged.
* Ability haste reduced to 20 from 25.
* Flux base cooldown reduction increased to 15% from 10%.
* Flux cooldown reduction lethality ratio reduced to {{as|{{fd|0.15}}% per 1 Lethality}} from {{as|{{fd|0.3%}}|lethality}}.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|663}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|3000}}.
* Flux cooldown refund lethality ratio reduced to {{as|{{fd|0.3%}} per 1 lethality|lethality}} from {{as|{{fd|0.4%}}|lethality}}.

;[[V13.16]]
* Base ultimate cooldown refund increased to 10% from 5%.

;[[V13.15]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Tooltip now displays the accurate cooldown refund percentage rather than 0%.

;[[V13.14]]
* Base ultimate cooldown refund reduced to 5% from 20%.
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Ultimate cooldown refund now scales with {{as|{{fd|0.4%}} per 1 Lethality}}.

;[[V13.1]]
* Lethality increased to 18 from 10.

;[[V12.8]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Flux now properly refunds {{ais|Devour|Tahm Kench}} cooldown.

;[[V12.1]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Flux now stacks correctly with the {{ri|Ultimate Hunter}} rune.
 
;[[V11.24]]
* Flux ultimate ability cooldown refund reduced to 20% from 25%.

;[[V11.23]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|3000}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 10 lethality, 25 ability haste.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Flux:}} Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them refunds 25% of your ultimate ability's '''total''' cooldown. ''Does not reduce cooldown below {{fd|0.5}} seconds.''
* Limited to 1 '''Axiom Arc'''.
}}
